scripts.run:all: bun run verify:plan && bun run fetch:phase1 && bun run fetch:raw-candidates && bun run audit:raw-tools && bun run build:diana-template && bun run verify:diana-raw && bun run build:raw-samplesheets && bun run smoke:raw && bun run build:alignment-smoke && bun run smoke:alignment && bun run fetch:human-reference-smoke && bun run smoke:human-reference && bun run fetch:full-reference-smoke && bun run smoke:full-reference && bun run fetch:production-somatic && bun run smoke:production-somatic && bun run fetch:full-wes && bun run benchmark:full-wes && bun run fetch:phase3-wgs && bun run validate:phase3-wgs && bun run verify:orthogonal && bun run build:panel && bun run analyze:hrd && bun run analyze:rna && bun run build:packet && bun run verify:outputs
scripts.nf:phase3-fetch:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile local --workflow phase3_fetch --phase3_reads full --phase3_fetch_concurrency 4 --phase3_aria2_split 1
scripts.nf:phase3-wgs:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile local --workflow phase3_wgs --phase3_reads full
scripts.nf:phase3-wgs:monolith:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile local --workflow phase3_wgs_monolith --phase3_reads full
scripts.infra:aws:plan:use1: terraform -chdir=infra/aws workspace select sra-use1 && TF_VAR_region=us-east-1 TF_VAR_environment=prod-use1 TF_VAR_image_tag=${AWS_IMAGE_TAG:-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)} terraform -chdir=infra/aws plan
scripts.infra:aws:apply:use1: terraform -chdir=infra/aws workspace select sra-use1 && TF_VAR_region=us-east-1 TF_VAR_environment=prod-use1 TF_VAR_image_tag=${AWS_IMAGE_TAG:-$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)} terraform -chdir=infra/aws apply
scripts.nf:aws:quick:stub: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow quick -stub-run
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-fetch:dev: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_fetch --phase3_reads 500000 --phase3_fetch_cpus 4 --phase3_fetch_memory '16 GB'
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-sra-benchmark: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_sra_benchmark --phase3_fetch_cpus 4 --phase3_fetch_memory '16 GB' --phase3_fetch_concurrency 8 --sra_benchmark_bytes 268435456 --sra_benchmark_parts 4
scripts.nf:aws:sra-bench:matrix:2cpu: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_sra_benchmark --phase3_fetch_cpus 2 --phase3_fetch_memory '8 GB' --sra_benchmark_matrix 'aws_s3api_range:4:268435456:4:aws-range-c4,aws_s3api_range:8:268435456:4:aws-range-c8,aws_s3api_range:16:134217728:4:aws-range-c16,s5cmd_cat:4:268435456:4:s5cat-c4,s5cmd_cat:8:268435456:4:s5cat-c8'
scripts.nf:aws:sra-bench:matrix:4cpu: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_sra_benchmark --phase3_fetch_cpus 4 --phase3_fetch_memory '16 GB' --sra_benchmark_matrix 'aws_s3api_range:4:268435456:4:aws-range-c4,aws_s3api_range:8:268435456:4:aws-range-c8,aws_s3api_range:16:134217728:4:aws-range-c16,s5cmd_cat:4:268435456:4:s5cat-c4,s5cmd_cat:8:268435456:4:s5cat-c8'
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-fetch:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_fetch --phase3_reads full --phase3_source_mode aws_sra --phase3_fetch_cpus 8 --phase3_fetch_memory '28 GB' --phase3_fetch_concurrency 8 --phase3_s3_range_concurrency 8 --phase3_sra_run_concurrency 2 --phase3_fastq_stats_mode metadata
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-wgs:dev: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_wgs --phase3_reads 500000
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-wgs:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_spot -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_wgs --phase3_reads full --phase3_source_mode aws_sra --phase3_fetch_cpus 8 --phase3_fetch_memory '28 GB' --phase3_ref_cpus 16 --phase3_ref_memory '28 GB' --phase3_align_cpus 16 --phase3_align_memory '96 GB' --phase3_downstream_cpus 16 --phase3_downstream_memory '64 GB' --phase3_fetch_concurrency 8 --phase3_s3_range_concurrency 8 --phase3_sra_run_concurrency 2 --phase3_fastq_stats_mode metadata --phase3_include_wes false --phase3_prereq_mode minimal
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-wgs:full:ondemand-large: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_wgs --phase3_reads full --phase3_source_mode aws_sra --phase3_fetch_cpus 8 --phase3_fetch_memory '48 GB' --phase3_ref_cpus 16 --phase3_ref_memory '32 GB' --phase3_align_cpus 32 --phase3_align_memory '96 GB' --phase3_downstream_cpus 16 --phase3_downstream_memory '64 GB' --phase3_fetch_concurrency 8 --phase3_s3_range_concurrency 8 --phase3_sra_run_concurrency 1 --phase3_fastq_stats_mode metadata --phase3_include_wes false --phase3_prereq_mode minimal
scripts.nf:aws:phase3-wgs:monolith:full: nextflow run main.nf -profile awsbatch_ondemand -params-file infra/aws/nextflow.aws.json --workflow phase3_wgs_monolith --phase3_reads full --phase3_source_mode aws_sra --phase3_fetch_concurrency 8 --phase3_s3_range_concurrency 8 --phase3_sra_run_concurrency 1 --phase3_wgs_cpus 16 --phase3_wgs_memory '28 GB' --phase3_include_wes false --phase3_prereq_mode minimal
